{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/11080850?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/esnard", "id": 11080850, "login": "esnard", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjExMDgwODUw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/esnard", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45802", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact
This is a significant Denial of Service (DoS) vulnerability. Any application that uses FPDI to process user-supplied PDF files is at risk. An attacker can upload a small, malicious PDF file that will cause the server-side script to crash due to memory exhaustion or a script time-out. Repeated attacks can lead to sustained service unavailability.

### Patches
Fixed as of version 2.6.7

### Workarounds
No.

### References

title: FPDI: Memory Exhaustion and Endless Loop in FPDI leads to Denial of Service
